title: Daewoo Extension Reel, 2 Gang 5 Metres Cassette Reel, with Resettable Safety Cut Out
features: SAFETY CUTOUT – Equipped with a reset button, this extension reel will automatically shut off if it becomes too hot during use, ensuring absolute safety
2 WAY SOCKET – Compatible with UK plugs, allowing you to connect up to two devices for versatile use in your home, office, or garden
5 METRE CABLE – Offering a longer reach from your mains socket when you need the extra length, both inside and outside. Avoid using outside in wet conditions
WINDING HANDLE – Use the winding handle to neatly store the cable when not in use, preventing tripping hazards
COMPACT DESIGN – Features a portable, lightweight design, making it easy to move around the house or office. Its slim and compact design also facilitates convenient storage when not in use
description: The Daewoo 2 Gang 5 Metre Extension Reel is your ideal companion for extending power where you need it most. With its compact and lightweight design, this cassette reel is perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, making it versatile for a range of tasks. Whether you're powering a vacuum cleaner in the living room or setting up lights in the garden for a summer evening gathering, this extension reel delivers reliable performance. The 5-metre cable length provides ample reach, allowing you to tackle tasks far from power outlets. The winding handle ensures easy cable retraction, keeping your space tidy and free from tangles. For added peace of mind, the reel features a resettable safety cut-out, protecting your appliances from overload and offering enhanced safety during use. This extension reel is ideal for indoor activities like home office setups, DIY projects, or even holiday lighting. It's also perfect for outdoor jobs like lawn mowing or powering tools in the garage. Just remember to avoid using it in wet conditions. The Daewoo 2 Gang Extension Reel combines convenience, safety, and flexibility, making it a must-have for any household.
